title: JourneyCraft
description: This modpack is designed to create an experience where the user can explore the world and have plenty to fight and see. In conjunction with that, it offers plenty of building blocks for players to take advantage and create to their hearts content.
body:
The Footprint Network presents the JourneyCraft Modpack.

This modpack is designed for players that wish to have a a fun adventure in Minecraft filled with exciting new biomes and locations to discover.

There are over 200 new biomes included in this modpack along with hundreds of new dungeons and structures.

The modpack also includes a wide range of decorative blocks to keep all the seasoned creators happy.

Journeycraft has something for everyone!
